description: Analyze the HEC-RAS unsteady flow results for the Muncie project ('Muncie.p04.hdf') to determine the dynamic range of water surface elevation (WSE) at each cross-section. Extract the Minimum WSE, Maximum WSE, and Channel Invert Elevation for every cross-section and calculate the Fluctuation Range (Max - Min). Save a summary CSV sorted by River Station to '/home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/stage_fluctuation_summary.csv' containing columns: 'River_Station', 'Invert_Elev_ft', 'Min_WSE_ft', 'Max_WSE_ft', and 'Fluctuation_Range_ft'. Record the River Station with the largest fluctuation range in '/home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/max_fluctuation_location.txt' using the format 'Station: <ID>, Range: <Value>'. Additionally, generate a profile plot of the Invert, Min WSE, and Max WSE envelopes versus River Station and save it to '/home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/wse_envelope_plot.png'.
